title: Goa Board HSSC/ 12th Class 2025 Exam Time Table

detail.short_info: Goa Board of Secondary & Higher Education (GBSHSE) has Released Revised Exam Time Table for HSSC/ 12th Class Exam 2025.

content.text: Name of the Post: Goa Board HSSC/ 12th Class 2025 Revised Exam Time Table Released
Brief Information: Goa Board of Secondary & Higher Education (GBSHSE) has released Exam Time Table for HSSC/ 12th Class Exam 2025. Candidates can check their Exam Dates at below link...

items.label: Important Dates
items.text: Revised Date of Theory Examination for General Stream: 10-02-2025 to 28-02-2025 Revised Date of Theory Examination for Vocational Stream: 11-02-2025 to 24-02-2025 Date of Examination for Audit of Vocational Courses : 03, 05, 07,13, 15-02-2024 Date of Practical Examination for (General Stream) : 08-01-2025 Date of for Practical Examination Audit of Vocational Courses : 08-01-2025 Date of Practical Examination for (NSQF Subjects) : 10-01-2025

seo_tags: Goa Board HSSC/ 12th Class Exam Date 2025 - Revised Exam Time Table Released
